rubric.goal: Correctly mark the non-ready request categories CR-06, CR-11, and CR-15 with the appropriate readiness statuses, production impacts, blocker references, and overall not-ready decision.
Correctly identify the CR-06 zero-claim contradiction from the side-channel banker email coded nonresponsive and select recode-and-produce remediation.
Correctly identify Rina Park's uncollected personal Gmail as a source gap affecting CR-06 and CR-15 with personal-email collection remediation.
Correctly identify Rina Park's partial personal phone collection missing Signal messages as a CR-15 source gap with Signal collection remediation.
Correctly identify the incomplete privilege log, including 1290 withheld documents, 480 logged documents, and 810 unlogged documents.
Correctly identify the seller-side banker third-party waiver for six attorney-client emails and select waiver assessment and disclosure remediation.
Correctly provide the production-readiness rollup metrics for privilege, waiver, miscoding, personal-source gaps, non-ready categories, and final readiness.
Correctly provide the prioritized action set and order for CR-06 recoding, personal-source collection, privilege-log supplementation, and waiver assessment.
